nasb.text: For the king of the North will again raise a greater multitude than the former, and after an interval of some years he will press on with a great army and much equipment.

esv.text: For the king of the north shall again raise a multitude, greater than the first. And after some years he shall come on with a great army and abundant supplies.

cnv.text: 北方王必再招聚大軍，比先前的更多；時機成熟的時候，他就率領裝備好了的大軍而來。

ccb.text: 因为数年后，北方王必召集更庞大的军队，带着大量装备卷土重来。
